title: Incorrect dtype when indexing into arrays
body:
---


Author Name: **Johan Bjork**
Original Redmine Issue: 1007 from https://www.veripool.org
Original Date: 2015-11-24
Original Assignee: Johan Bjork 

---

In the patch I submitted for "Fix dot indexing into arrayed inferfaces, #^A.", the dtype for the pin was collected by reaching back into the Ast assuming that the previous dtype node is the correct dtype for the interface. I can't quite argue why that would be the case, except it seems correct in pretty much any code/testcase I can throw at it. However, in one of our bigger designs, this is not the case and compilation fails.

I haven't been able to generate a testcase that demonstrates this issue, but I think this fix makes the code a lot easier to reason about and all existing testcases still pass.
https://github.com/phb/verilator-dev/tree/intf_array_dtype
